summary: Forensic audit of the Director's Loan Account (DLA) in Los Romeros Limited (06993349). Includes verified DLA balances from Companies House accounts (2018-2023), a complete officer timeline for all 12 directors and secretaries, analysis of the £33,481 DLA reduction during the Wincham transition period (2019-2020), legal assessment of S455 CT exposure, and actionable recommendations for Phil Harrison's MVL process.
